_comment: Program archetypes to expand admission templates across. focus + prereq make each program's page genuinely distinct (anti-thin). Add a row + rebuild to publish a new program page per destination.

rows.name: Bachelor in Business
rows.focus: An undergraduate degree covering management, economics, accounting and marketing fundamentals — the most common entry point for international undergraduates.

prereq.label: School-leaving qualification with maths
prereq.detail: A completed secondary-school qualification (e.g. high-school diploma, A-levels or equivalent) including a solid mathematics grade; some schools require a foundation year for systems with 11–12 years of schooling.

rows.name: MSc Computer Science
rows.focus: A taught Master's in algorithms, systems, software engineering and AI/ML, usually expecting a computing or strongly quantitative first degree.

prereq.label: Computing background (programming & algorithms)
prereq.detail: A Bachelor's in computer science or a related field, with demonstrable programming, data structures and algorithms coursework. Some programs accept a strong conversion/bridging record.

rows.name: MSc Data Science
rows.focus: A taught Master's blending statistics, machine learning and data engineering — admissions weigh mathematics and programming evidence heavily.

prereq.label: Statistics & programming background
prereq.detail: Prior coursework in statistics/linear algebra/probability and at least one programming language (often Python or R). Applicants from non-CS degrees are admitted if the quantitative record is strong.

rows.name: MSc Mechanical Engineering
rows.focus: A taught Master's in mechanics, thermodynamics, materials and design — admissions expect an accredited engineering first degree.

prereq.label: Accredited engineering Bachelor's
prereq.detail: A Bachelor's in mechanical (or closely related) engineering covering engineering mathematics, mechanics and thermodynamics; ECTS/credit equivalence is checked for non-EU degrees.

rows.name: MBA
rows.focus: A general-management Master's built around case learning, leadership and a cohort of experienced professionals — admissions weigh work record and GMAT/GRE.

prereq.label: Bachelor's + management aptitude
prereq.detail: A recognised Bachelor's in any field plus evidence of leadership/management potential; many top programs interview shortlisted candidates.

rows.name: PhD in Engineering
rows.focus: A research degree where a supervisor match and a fundable proposal matter more than a fixed checklist — often paired with a funded position or scholarship.

prereq.label: Relevant Master's + research proposal & supervisor
prereq.detail: A relevant Master's (or strong research-oriented Bachelor's in some systems), a research proposal, and usually a prospective supervisor who agrees to take you on.
